{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Iron
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Iron]] can feel the ground shaking.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Lindon crouched next to the Iron, speaking into his ear. “Do you feel the ground shaking?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
